Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar May-23-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (Via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DANIEL COX, Esq. of Quill & Arrow, LLP (tel: 310-933-4271) for Plaintiff.
Atty. SARAH LAMBERT, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani LLP (tel: 415-986-5900) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT JAGUAR LAND ROVER NORTH AMERICA, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying Defendant's Motion to Compel Arbitration (see signed order for complete ruling.) (302/RBU)*****

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF NANCY RIVERA's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Joshua Kohanoff, Esq., of QUILL & ARROW, LLP, (310) 933-4271, for Plaintiff.

SARAH CARLSON LAMBERT, Esq., of GORDON REES SCULLY MANSUKHANI, LLP, (415) 986-5900, for Defendant.

The matter is not argued/contested. The matter is briefly discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court adopts its tentative ruling. Proceedings on this motion shall be stayed under Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Sec. 1281.4, pending the Court's determination of Defendant's motion to compel arbitration, which is currently set for hearing on May 23, 2024. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Set For Trial On Feb-24-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
